title: commersonia densiflora
intro: Commersonia densiflora, also known as the pink ball or bush tomato, is a plant native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Commersonia densiflora include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed in a variety of ways.
